hook: The whole plan costs less than one session.
vo: There's an optional monthly plan — costs less than a single session.
No commission on sessions. The only per-session cost is standard card processing, and Faresay keeps none of it.
You set your prices. You keep your clients. You own your data.

cta: Free to start. The optional plan costs less than a single session.
